subjects.description: A series of bright orange traffic cones with reflective white stripes, placed in a staggered line along the road to delineate the construction zone and guide vehicles through the diversion path.
subjects.appearance_details: Standard 28-inch orange PVC cones with two horizontal reflective silver-white bands; slightly dusty from road debris; some cones have minor scuffs.
subjects.relationship: Primary navigational obstacles that define the diversion corridor for the ego vehicle.
subjects.location: Center and center-right of frame, progressively appearing from mid-ground to foreground as the vehicle approaches.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium within frame as the vehicle passes close by.
subjects.orientation: Upright, facing the camera/vehicle approach direction.
subjects.pose: Stationary, upright on the asphalt surface.
subjects.action: Static placement on the road surface.
subjects.state_changes: Cones appear small in the distance and grow larger as the vehicle approaches and passes them; they shift from center to the left side of frame as the vehicle diverts rightward.

subjects.description: A yellow diamond-shaped construction warning sign mounted on a portable stand, displaying a detour arrow symbol, positioned at the start of the construction zone on the right shoulder.
subjects.appearance_details: Bright yellow reflective diamond sign with black arrow curving to the right; mounted on a collapsible metal A-frame stand with orange and white striped base panels.
subjects.relationship: Provides advance warning and directional guidance to the ego vehicle about the upcoming diversion.
subjects.location: Right side of frame, mid-ground transitioning to foreground.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, briefly Medium within frame as the vehicle passes.
subjects.state_changes: Grows in apparent size as the vehicle approaches, then exits the frame to the right.

subjects.description: Temporary bright yellow lane markings painted on the asphalt, deviating from the original white dashed lane lines, guiding traffic through the construction diversion path in a gentle curve to the right.
subjects.appearance_details: Bold yellow dashed lines contrasting with faded original white lane markings; slightly raised texture from fresh paint application.
subjects.relationship: Serves as the primary lane guidance for the ego vehicle through the diversion zone.
subjects.location: Bottom half of frame, stretching from mid-ground to foreground along the road surface.
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame, spanning the road surface.
subjects.orientation: Extending away from the camera into the distance, curving gently to the right.
subjects.state_changes: The lines appear to curve rightward as the vehicle enters the diversion; the old white markings become less visible as the yellow temporary lines dominate.

background_setting: A two-lane main road in a suburban area during daytime, with an active construction zone ahead. The left lane is partially closed off by traffic cones and temporary barriers. Beyond the construction zone, excavated earth and parked construction machinery (a yellow backhoe and an orange dump truck) are visible on the left shoulder. Low commercial buildings and scattered trees line both sides of the road. The asphalt is grey with patches of wear, and a clear sky with sparse white clouds stretches overhead. Power lines run along the right side of the road.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday daylight under a mostly clear sky with occasional thin clouds; strong natural sunlight.
lighting.direction: Top-lit with slight front-left illumination, casting shadows toward the right and behind objects.
lighting.shadows: Short, well-defined shadows cast by traffic cones and the construction sign onto the asphalt; vehicle dashboard casts a subtle shadow at the bottom of the frame.
lighting.illumination_effect: High visibility conditions with strong contrast between the bright orange cones and the grey asphalt; reflective strips on cones glint in the sunlight; the yellow temporary lane markings appear vivid and easy to distinguish.

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashboard camera perspective with a vanishing point slightly right of center due to the road diversion curve; road surface occupies the lower two-thirds of the frame while sky and surroundings fill the upper third; strong linear perspective from lane markings and cone lines.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dominant grey asphalt with vivid orange cones, bright yellow temporary markings, green foliage on the roadside, and a pale blue sky; high-visibility safety colors contrast against neutral road tones.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Focused, alert, and controlled; a sense of cautious navigation through a clearly marked hazard zone with an underlying feeling of technological competence and safety.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating pattern of evenly spaced orange traffic cones forming a converging diagonal line; dashed yellow lane markings creating rhythmic intervals on the road surface.

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving tracking shot from the ego vehicle's dashboard perspective; the camera gently shifts rightward as the vehicle follows the diversion curve.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the full road ahead, construction zone, and surrounding environment from a first-person driving perspective.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level from the driver's seated position, approximately 1.2 meters above ground level.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead, traffic cones, and lane markings; background buildings and sky remain in acceptable focus.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 28mm equivalent to simulate a dashcam field of view.

context: Autonomous vehicle perception and navigation demonstration showing the vehicle's ability to detect temporary construction zone elements and safely navigate a road diversion.

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward on the main road at moderate speed; the construction zone and diversion signage become visible ahead in the distance, with traffic cones and a detour sign appearing on the horizon.

The vehicle approaches the construction zone entrance; the detour sign and first cones are clearly visible. The vehicle begins to gently steer right, following the temporary yellow lane markings that diverge from the original lane.

The vehicle smoothly navigates through the diversion path, passing closely alongside the row of traffic cones on the left. The temporary yellow lane markings guide the vehicle through a gentle rightward curve, and the vehicle maintains a safe, centered position within the designated diverted lane. Construction equipment is visible to the left beyond the cones.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold black capital letters on a bright orange diamond-shaped reflective sign; large font, approximately 4-inch tall lettering.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right side of frame in the mid-ground, visible from approximately 0:00 to 0:02 before being passed.
text_and_signage_elements.context: Advance warning sign alerting drivers to the upcoming construction zone.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black text and arrow on a yellow rectangular sign; bold sans-serif font with a rightward-pointing arrow.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right side of frame, visible from approximately 0:01 to 0:03 as the vehicle approaches and passes the diversion point.
text_and_signage_elements.context: Directional guidance sign indicating the diversion path for vehicles to follow around the construction zone.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives forward along the main road, approaching the construction zone. Warning signs and distant traffic cones become visible ahead. The road appears straight with original white lane markings still visible.
segments.key_changes: The construction zone grows closer; cones and signs transition from distant small elements to clearly identifiable objects; the temporary yellow lane markings begin to appear on the road surface.
segments.camera: Steady forward-moving dashcam perspective at eye level; slight vibration from vehicle motion on the road.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches the start of the diversion zone. It detects the cone line and altered lane markings, beginning a smooth rightward steering adjustment to enter the diversion path.
segments.key_changes: The vehicle's trajectory shifts from straight to a gentle rightward curve; the detour sign passes on the right; the first traffic cones appear prominently in the center-left of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam with a subtle rightward drift as the vehicle begins to follow the diversion curve.

segments.description: The vehicle navigates smoothly through the diversion corridor, staying centered within the temporary yellow lane markings. Orange cones pass closely on the left, and construction equipment and excavated earth are briefly visible beyond the cone barrier. The vehicle maintains safe speed and lane discipline throughout.
segments.key_changes: Cones pass by on the left in succession; the road curves gently and then begins to straighten as the vehicle completes the diversion; construction activity is visible in the background to the left.
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam following the gentle curve of the diversion; the perspective gradually returns toward straight alignment as the diversion path completes.

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the dashcam view shows a straight suburban main road stretching ahead, with a construction zone becoming visible in the distance—orange cones and warning signs dot the horizon. By 0:01, the 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' sign is clearly legible on the right shoulder, and the line of traffic cones defining the diversion comes into sharper focus. At 0:02, the vehicle has reached the diversion entry point; a 'DETOUR' sign with a rightward arrow stands on the right side, and bright yellow temporary lane markings appear on the asphalt, diverging from the faded white originals. The vehicle begins a smooth rightward steering adjustment. From 0:03 onward, the vehicle is fully within the diversion corridor, passing closely alongside the row of orange cones on the left. Through the gaps between cones, a yellow backhoe and piles of excavated earth are briefly visible. The temporary yellow dashed markings guide the vehicle along a gentle curve. By 0:04, the vehicle is centered confidently within the diverted lane, and the road begins to straighten. At 0:05, the vehicle is completing the diversion path, with the last cones passing out of frame to the left, and the open road ahead begins to return to its normal configuration.
audio_description: Consistent low hum of the vehicle's engine and tire noise on asphalt throughout. At the start, a faint ambient road noise is present with distant traffic sounds. As the vehicle enters the construction zone around 0:02, a subtle change in road surface texture produces a slightly rougher tire sound. Faint construction activity sounds—distant clanking of machinery and a low diesel engine rumble from the backhoe—are audible from 0:03 to 0:05. A soft electronic chime or beep at 0:02 suggests the vehicle's detection system acknowledging the construction zone. Wind noise is minimal due to moderate speed.
